sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18540" key="a)fro/skordon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀφρόσκορδον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <title_ TEIform="title">African</title_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σκόροδον,</foreign> i.e. <sense id="n18540.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Cyprian garlic, Allium sativum,</tr_> Colum.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.3.20</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
